news_items.headline: Never-say-die Dodgers turn 6-run deficit into 5-run victory over Padres
I apologize, Cedric Mullins: Rays 5, Royals 2
news_items.summary: If you would’ve told me the Rays would convincingly sweep a team on the road two weeks ago after what I saw in person at Dodger Stadium, I’d hedge your bet. The Rays, on their first west coast swing of the season, went 1-5 and lost three straight games in one-run fashion. and in the […]

news_items.headline: Dodgers overcome Roki Sasaki's poor performance to rout Padres
news_items.summary: Roki Sasaki gives up six runs in only three innings, but the Dodgers offense comes through by scoring 12 straight runs against the beleaguered Padres.
